title: Creative Direction
description:
Presented as part of Continuity, The Floor Lamp is produced from hand-lacquered board with a satin aluminium base. A tall, vertical form is designed to operate at two scales – casting a soft ambient glow within a room, or providing directed light when placed beside an armchair. A dimmable switch and aluminium bobbin for cable management maintain clarity and utility. Fabricated by French artisans, the Floor Standing Lamp forms part of the Board collection and is available in six colourways.

Continuity — Edward Robinson
Opening April 2
Exhibition on view April 3–25

Jousse Entreprise
18 Rue de Seine
75006 Paris
